name: File Lock Detector
description: Detect which process is locking a file or folder, preventing deletion or modification. Optionally kill the locking process.

inputs.label: File or Folder Path
inputs.help: Full path to the locked file or folder

inputs.label: Check all files in folder (recursive)
inputs.help: When checking a folder, scan all files inside recursively

inputs.label: Kill the locking process
inputs.help: ⚠️ When enabled, will terminate the process holding the file lock
